candidate_problem_record.subject: science
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Consider the following back-to-back stemplot:
Which of the following are true statements?
I. The distributions have the same mean.
II. The distributions have the same range.
III. The distributions have the same standard deviation.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

extraction_notes: Source choices are an unlabeled array; choice_map labels A-E were assigned by order.
Answer is the numeric value 3, but the record does not make clear whether it uses 0-based or 1-based indexing, so raw_answer_text was kept as the original value.
image field contains a PIL.Image object representation rather than a path/URL, so image_paths is empty.
